title: Pack of 6 Guess That Tune Kazoo Christmas Crackers - 12" Gingerbread Festive Xmas Holiday Dinner Table Decorations Red - Family Game Novelty Fun Prizes Gifts Contains Hats Jokes
features: This box of six 12" Christmas crackers features a charming gingerbread design, adding a cheerful seasonal touch to your festive table and creating a warm, inviting atmosphere for guests.
Alongside traditional cracker surprises, this set includes a fun kazoo game with six tune cards, offering interactive entertainment and plenty of laughter for the whole family to enjoy.
Each cracker contains the much-loved classics: a colourful paper hat, a witty motto or joke, and the signature snap, delivering the joyful festive moment everyone looks forward to.
Perfect for family dinners, parties, and festive gatherings, these crackers are both decorative and entertaining, making them a great way to bring people together during Christmas celebrations.
Beautifully presented in a decorative box, this set of six crackers combines traditional style with engaging activities, ensuring your holiday celebrations are memorable and full of fun.
description: Product Description Musical Christmas Crackers Celebrate in style with Harvey & Mason Musical Christmas Crackers, expertly crafted to bring elegance, sparkle, and festive fun to your table. Each set offers a luxurious design, classic tradition, and joyful surprises for family and friends to enjoy this holiday season. Crackers for Unforgettable Festive Moments Festive Fun with Gingerbread Musical Crackers Delight guests with six gingerbread-themed crackers featuring hats, mottos, snaps and a lively kazoo game. Includes six tune cards for festive sing-alongs, adding laughter, music and style to your Christmas celebrations. Musical Whistle Crackers for Joyful Gatherings Brighten your table with eight striped crackers complete with hats, jokes, snaps and a whistle game. Play up to 14 Christmas tunes together with easy instructions, ensuring festive fun for all ages while using recyclable packaging.
